---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

# Creating Xenium object 

```{r}
.libPaths('/projectnb/paxlab/presh/giotto_libs')
.libPaths()

library(Giotto)
library(ggplot2)

# Ensure Giotto can access the python env
set_giotto_python_path(python_path = '/usr3/graduate/preshita/.conda/envs/giotto_env/bin/python', verbose = NULL, initialize = TRUE)


data_path = '/projectnb/paxlab/DATA/DriesSpatial/Xenium/output-XETG00253__0048833__488B__20241217__182301'


results_folder <- '/projectnb/paxlab/presh/giotto_output'

instrs <- createGiottoInstructions(
  show_plot = T,
  return_plot = FALSE,
  save_plot = FALSE,
  save_dir = results_folder
)

data_path <- '/projectnb/paxlab/DATA/DriesSpatial/Xenium/output-XETG00253__0048833__488B__20241217__182301'
x <- importXenium(data_path)
force(x)

xenium488B  <- giotto(instructions = instrs) |>
  setGiotto(x$load_polys()) |>
  setGiotto(x$load_expression('/projectnb/paxlab/DATA/DriesSpatial/Xenium/output-XETG00253__0048833__488B__20241217__182301/cell_feature_matrix/')) |>
  setGiotto(x$load_cellmeta()) |>
  addSpatialCentroidLocations()

force(xenium488B)

plot(xenium488B@spatial_locs$cell$raw)


xenium488B = filterGiotto(xenium488B, feat_det_in_min_cells = 100, 
                  min_det_feats_per_cell = 20, 
                  expression_threshold = 1)

norm_name <- 'normalized'
xenium488B = normalizeGiotto(xenium488B)

```

# Statistics
```{r}

xenium488B = addStatistics(xenium488B)


test <- spatPlot2D(gobject = xenium488B,
                   show_image = F,
                   point_alpha = 0.7,
                   point_size = 0.6,
                   background_color = 'black',
                   cell_color = 'nr_feats',
                   color_as_factor = F,
                   save_param = list(
                     save_name = 'nr_feats',
                     base_width = 15,
                     base_height = 15))

xenium488B = runPCA(gobject = xenium488B,
            spat_unit = 'cell',
            expression_values = norm_name)

screePlot(xenium488B)

```

# UMAP 
```{r}

# Run and Plot tSNE and UMAP
xenium488B = runUMAP(xenium488B,
             expression_values = norm_name,
             dimensions_to_use = 1:13,
             spat_unit = 'cell')

plotUMAP(xenium488B,
         point_size = 0.01,
         save_param = list(
           save_name = 'sg_UMAP'))

# Clustering and UMAP cluster visualization
xenium488B = createNearestNetwork(xenium488B,
                          dimensions_to_use = 1:13,
                          expression_values = norm_name,
                          k = 25,
                          spat_unit = 'cell')
xenium488B = doLeidenCluster(xenium488B,
                     resolution = 0.1,
                     n_iterations = 10,
                     spat_unit = 'cell')

# Plot Leiden clusters onto UMAP
plotUMAP(gobject = xenium488B,
         spat_unit = 'cell',
         # select_cells = healthy_cancer,
         cell_color = 'leiden_clus',
         show_legend = TRUE,
         point_size = 0.01,
         point_shape = 'no_border',
         save_param = list(save_name = 'sg_umap_leiden'))

xenium_crop <- subsetGiottoLocs(xenium488B, x_min = 5000, x_max = 10600)

my_spatPlot <- spatPlot2D(gobject = xenium_crop,
                          spat_unit = 'cell',
                          cell_color = 'leiden_clus',
                          point_size = 0.025,
                          point_shape = 'no_border',
                          # color_as_factor = F,
                          show_legend = TRUE,point_border_stroke = 0,
                          background_color = 'black', show_plot = T,
                          save_param = list(
                            save_name = 'sg_spat_leiden',
                            base_width = 15,
                            base_height = 15))

```





```{r}

# Testing clustering with the spatial ATACseq dataset #########################
test2 = readRDS('/Users/preshitadave/Downloads/saveAtacgiotto.rds')

sg <- test2$Deepseq


# we should filter out more cells since we know that the borders are not great 
int.cells.atac = read.csv('/Users/preshitadave/Downloads/int_cells_trim_atac.csv', header = T, row.names = 1)
int.cells.atac =int.cells.atac$x

sg2 = subsetGiotto(
  sg,
  spat_unit = ":all:", feat_type = ":all:", 
  cell_ids = int.cells.atac
)



sg2 = filterGiotto(sg2, feat_det_in_min_cells = 100,
                  spat_unit = 'cell',
                  feat_type = 'atac',
                  expression_values = 'GeneScoreMatrix',
                  min_det_feats_per_cell = 20, 
                  expression_threshold = 1)


norm_name <- 'normalized'
activeSpatUnit(sg2) <- 'cell'
activeFeatType(sg2) <- 'atac'
sg2 = normalizeGiotto(sg2, norm_methods = 'standard', name = norm_name, expression_values = 'GeneScoreMatrix')
# Statistics
sg2 = addStatistics(sg2, expression_values = norm_name)


test <- spatPlot2D(gobject = sg2,
                   show_image = F,
                   point_alpha = 0.7,
                   point_size = 0.6,
                   background_color = 'black',
                   cell_color = 'nr_feats',
                   color_as_factor = F,
                   save_param = list(
                     save_name = 'nr_feats',
                     base_width = 15,
                     base_height = 15))

sg2 <- calculateHVF(gobject = sg2, )

sg2 = runPCA(gobject = sg2,
            spat_unit = 'cell',
            expression_values = norm_name)

screePlot(sg2)

# Run and Plot tSNE and UMAP
sg2 = runUMAP(sg2,
             expression_values = norm_name,
             dimensions_to_use = 1:13,
             spat_unit = 'cell')

plotUMAP(sg2,
         point_size = 0.01,
         save_param = list(
           save_name = 'sg_UMAP'))

# Clustering and UMAP cluster visualization
sg2 = createNearestNetwork(sg2,
                          dimensions_to_use = 1:13,
                          expression_values = norm_name,
                          k = 25,
                          spat_unit = 'cell')
sg2 = doLeidenClusterIgraph(sg2,
                     resolution = 0.4,
                     n_iterations = 10,
                     spat_unit = 'cell')

# Plot Leiden clusters onto UMAP
plotUMAP(gobject = sg2,
         spat_unit = 'cell',
         # select_cells = healthy_cancer,
         cell_color = 'leiden_clus',
         show_legend = TRUE,
         point_size = 0.01,
         point_shape = 'no_border',
         save_param = list(save_name = 'sg_umap_leiden'))

my_spatPlot <- spatPlot2D(gobject = sg2,
                          spat_unit = 'cell',
                          cell_color = 'leiden_clus',
                          point_size = 0.025,
                          point_shape = 'no_border',
                          # color_as_factor = F,
                          show_legend = TRUE,point_border_stroke = 0,
                          background_color = 'black',
                          save_param = list(
                            save_name = 'sg_spat_leiden',
                            base_width = 15,
                            base_height = 15))
```


# Align using Giotto's alignment tool
```{r}
atac_align <- spatPlot2D(gobject = sg2,
                          spat_unit = 'cell',
                          cell_color = 'leiden_clus',
                          point_size = 0.025,
                          point_shape = 'no_border',
                          # color_as_factor = F,
                          show_legend = TRUE,point_border_stroke = 0,
                          background_color = 'black',
                         return_plot = T,
                          save_param = list(
                            save_name = 'sg_spat_leiden',
                            base_width = 15,
                            base_height = 15))

xen_align <- spatPlot2D(gobject = xenium488B,
                         spat_unit = 'cell',
                         cell_color = 'leiden_clus',
                         point_size = 0.025,
                         point_shape = 'no_border',
                         # color_as_factor = F,
                         show_legend = TRUE,
                        point_border_stroke = 0,
                         background_color = 'black',
                        show_plot = T,
                        return_plot = T,
                         save_param = list(
                           save_name = 'sg_spat_leiden',
                           base_width = 15,
                           base_height = 15))

points <- interactiveLandmarkSelection(xen_align, atac_align)
force(points)

# > points
# [[1]]
#            x          y
# 1   5990.106 -1935.6520
# 2   6522.827 -2184.6869
# 3   6640.441 -2120.6494
# 4   6931.016 -2376.7996
# 5  10203.409 -1211.8988
# 6  10322.300 -2346.0708
# 7  10414.771 -2169.8887
# 8  10487.427 -2390.1163
# 9   9747.658 -1085.2680
# 10  6438.514  -859.5347
# 11  7620.823 -1145.8305
# 12  8334.172 -1206.3931
# 13  8704.056 -1134.8192
# 14  5474.172  -991.6713
# 15  6009.184 -1035.7168
# 16  5262.810 -1938.6498
# 
# [[2]]
#            x        y
# 1  1532.0432 5940.063
# 2  2230.2891 5614.557
# 3  2368.3145 5636.750
# 4  2774.2714 5340.835
# 5  6961.6426 7271.680
# 6  7222.5319 5769.912
# 7  7401.0351 5984.450
# 8  7455.9592 5732.923
# 9  6432.9985 7367.853
# 10 2059.6701 7523.208
# 11 3515.1578 7057.142
# 12 4496.9254 7064.540
# 13 4998.1074 7212.497
# 14  810.1477 7397.444
# 15 1510.4295 7316.068
# 16  542.3929 5962.257

affine_mtx <- calculateAffineMatrixFromLandmarks(
  source = points[[2]], # from slice 2
  target = points[[1]] # from slice 1
)

# > affine_mtx
#             x          y          
# x  0.75980146 0.03701443  4618.899
# y -0.03802109 0.70688574 -6088.528
#    0.00000000 0.00000000     1.000

force(affine_mtx)

sg_affine <- affine(sg2, y = affine_mtx, pre_multiply = T)

# Plot the first layer
terra::plot(xenium488B@spatial_info$cell)

# Add the second layer with terra-specific parameters
terra::points(sg_affine@spatial_locs$cell$raw@coordinates, 
            col = "red",   cex = 0.3)        
```


# Differential gene expression 

## Gini markers 

```{r}
gini_markers <- findMarkers_one_vs_all(gobject = xenium488B,
                                       method = "gini",
                                       expression_values = "normalized",
                                       cluster_column = "leiden_clus",
                                       min_feats = 10)

topgenes_gini <- gini_markers[, head(.SD, 5), by = "cluster"]$feats
```


```{r}
gini_markers2 = gini_markers[gini_markers$feats %in% topgenes_gini, ]

plotMetaDataHeatmap(xenium488B, 
                    selected_feats = unique(topgenes_gini),
                    metadata_cols = "leiden_clus",
                    x_text_size = 10, y_text_size = 10)
```

```{r}
dimFeatPlot2D(xenium488B, 
              expression_values = "scaled",
              feats = (unique(topgenes_gini)),
              cow_n_col = 5, 
              point_size = 1,
              save_param = list(base_width = 15, base_height = 20))

```

## scran markers

```{r}
scran_markers <- findMarkers_one_vs_all(gobject = xenium488B,
                                       method = "scran",
                                       expression_values = "normalized",
                                       cluster_column = "leiden_clus",
                                       min_feats = 10)

topgenes_scran <- scran_markers[, head(.SD, 5), by = "cluster"]$feats
```


```{r}
plotMetaDataHeatmap(xenium488B, 
                    selected_feats = unique(topgenes_scran),
                    metadata_cols = "leiden_clus",
                    x_text_size = 10, y_text_size = 10)
```

```{r}
dimFeatPlot2D(xenium488B, 
              expression_values = "scaled",
              feats = sort(unique(topgenes_scran)),
              cow_n_col = 5, 
              point_size = 1,
              save_param = list(base_width = 20, base_height = 20))
```
